untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a multi-bar pattern (successive higher pivot lows with specific proximity clustering and proximity to resistance level). This requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not expressible through single-bar indicator comparisons. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters for proximity_tightness and distance_to_resistance are undefined and cannot be operationalized. The pattern involves historical sequence analysis that exceeds the scope of point-in-time indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points (r1 for resistance, s1 for support level) and directional price logic, but the core pattern recognition requirement—detecting successive higher lows within tight clustering ranges relative to resistance—requires custom pattern detection unavailable in the allowed indicators list. A proper implementation would need a dedicated pattern-matching function or multi-bar lookback window logic.
